description: baggit was founded in 1990 and since then has created a name in the market for fighting against cruelty to animals. A practical and stylish choice of bag in brown with extra roomy space and comfortable to carry, this leatherette bag will give a sophisticated look to any casual outfit.Height: 26 cmWidth: 30 cmDepth: 22 cmMade of leatherette for durabilityHas one large main zipped compartment with two internal zipped pocketsTwo short handle woven through loops for carrying easeSmall zipped pocket on back with a mobile pouchGraphic print with glitter and a fabric glossy bow on the handle for styleStylish, easy to grip, synthetic leather zip pullsBag careWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
